title: User Authentication System

description.summary: Implement user authentication with Discord OAuth2 for the web companion site
description.motivation: Users need to log into the web companion to view their card collections and manage their profiles securely
description.detailed_design: Use Discord OAuth2 flow with Flask-Login for session management. Store session tokens in SQLite with expiry. Add middleware to protect authenticated routes.
breaking_changes: All /web/* routes now require authentication except /web/login and /web/public/*

files_affected.description: New authentication service with OAuth2 flow, token management, and session handling
Added login/logout routes and auth middleware to existing web routes
Added user_sessions table for storing OAuth tokens
Login page with Discord OAuth button

test_cases.title: OAuth2 callback processes authorization code correctly
procedure: Navigate to /web/login and click 'Login with Discord'
Verify redirect back to /web/callback with authorization code
Verify user session is created in database
Verify redirect to /web/dashboard with authenticated session
test_cases.expected_result: User is authenticated, session token stored in SQLite, redirected to dashboard
test_cases.actual_result: OAuth callback processed successfully, session created with 24h expiry, dashboard loaded with user data

evidence.description: Auth service log showing successful token exchange
evidence.content:
[2026-04-03 14:25:33] INFO auth_service: OAuth2 token exchange successful for user#1234
[2026-04-03 14:25:33] INFO auth_service: Session created: sid=a1b2c3, expires=2026-04-04T14:25:33
[2026-04-03 14:25:33] INFO web.routes: Redirecting authenticated user to /web/dashboard

sqlite3 data/bot.db "SELECT sid, user_id, expires_at FROM user_sessions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;"
a1b2c3|1234|2026-04-04 14:25:33

test_cases.title: Unauthenticated access to protected routes redirects to login
procedure: Verify redirect to /web/login with return_url parameter
Verify no session data is exposed
test_cases.expected_result: 302 redirect to /web/login?return_url=/web/dashboard with no session leakage

handoff.progress_summary: OAuth2 service layer complete and tested. Login/logout routes added. Middleware for route protection is partially implemented — decorator function exists but not yet applied to all routes.
next_steps: Apply @require_auth decorator to all /web/* routes except /login, /callback, /public/*
Implement session refresh logic (auto-refresh if token expires within 1 hour)
Add logout endpoint that clears session from SQLite
Run T2 test case (unauthenticated access redirect)
Update web/templates to show logged-in user info in header
blockers: Need Discord application Client ID and Secret in .env (user must provide)
key_context: Using Flask-Login for session management, NOT raw cookies
Sessions stored in SQLite user_sessions table with 24h expiry
OAuth2 scopes: identify, email, guilds (for future guild-based permissions)
All auth routes under /web/ prefix, bot commands unaffected

files_in_progress.notes: @require_auth decorator defined but only applied to /dashboard and /profile so far
Complete and tested — OAuth2 flow, token exchange, session CRUD

decisions_made.decision: Use SQLite for session storage instead of Redis
decisions_made.rationale: Project already uses SQLite for all data. Adding Redis would be a new dependency for a single-server bot. If scaling is needed later, sessions can be migrated.
Balances security with UX. Users won't need to re-auth daily for active sessions, but inactive sessions expire within a day.

session_history.summary: Created TC, designed auth architecture, implemented OAuth2 service layer (services/auth_service.py). Made key decisions on session storage (SQLite) and expiry (24h).
changes_made: Designed database schema for user_sessions table
Made architectural decisions: SQLite sessions, 24h expiry

notes: This TC is part of the web companion site feature set. Future TCs for profile management and guild-based permissions will depend on this authentication system.
